case_title: CITY STORAGE VS. UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF LODGING OF ADMINSTRATIVE RECORD RE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CITY STORAGE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE. (BOTH SIDES HAVE REQUESTED THAT THE COURT ISSUE A STATEMENT OF DECISION.) HEARING HELD AND ARGUED. COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT PROPOSED STATEMENTS OF DECISION ON DISK OR EMAIL TO THE COURT AND EACH OTHER BY 7/2/2010. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT REPLIES TO THE COURT AND EACH OTHER BY 7/23/2010, WHICH WILL BE THE DATE OF SUBMISSION FOR THE COURT'S PURPOSES. (NO FURTHER APPEARANCES WILL BE REQUIRED.) (COUNSEL AGREE TO SERVE EACH OTHER BY MAIL OR EMAIL.) (THE REPLIES MAY BE LETTER BRIEFS LODGED WITH THE COURT.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CITY STORAGE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1087, THE COURT GRANTS AN ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE COMMANDING RESPONDENT TO FILE AN OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION BY MAY 27, 2010. PETITIONER HAS UNTIL JUNE 7, 2010 TO REPLY. THE HEARING ON THE WRIT WILL BE HELD ON JUNE 10, 2010. PETITIONER TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; COURT REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

calendar.matters:
Petitioner City Storage'S Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate (Continued From 06/10/10 To 06/11/10)
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CITY STORAGE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on June 30, 2010. (Respondent to arrange pick up of the Administrative Record that was lodged with the Court.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Petitioner City Storage'S Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate (Continued From 06/10/10 To 06/11/10)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Continued To Jul-23-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner City Storage's Motion for Judgment on Peremptory Writ of Mandate (Continued From 06/10/10 to 06/11/10). Appearances: Nancy A. Aimola, Esq. Attorney at Law, (831) 623-4919 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Elizabeth E'Vaughan Edwards, Deputy Attorney General, Office of the Attorney General, (415) 703-5536 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. (Both sides have requested that the Court issue a statement of decision.) Hearing held and argued. Ruling: Counsel shall submit proposed statements of decision on disk or email to the Court and each other by 7/2/2010. Counsel to submit replies to the Court and each other by 7/23/2010, which will be the date of submission for the Court's purposes. (No further appearances will be required.) (Counsel agree to serve each other by mail or email.) (The replies may be letter briefs lodged with the Court.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CITY STORAGE Motion for Judgment on Peremptory Writ of Mandate. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is continued to 6/11/2010 on the Court's motion. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To Jun-10-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CITY STORAGE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Pursuant to CCP section 1087, the court grants an alternative writ of mandate commanding respondent to file an opposition to the petition by May 27, 2010. Petitioner has until June 7, 2010 to reply. The hearing on the writ will be held on June 10, 2010. Petitioner to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
